user.title: Pulse-Eight Matrix Audio
user.description: Enter the network address of your Pulse-Eight matrix.

data_description.port: TCP control port (50005 on all ProAudio units)
data_description.model: Selects the input and zone (output) counts for your unit.
data_description.extended_io: Recommended. Makes input numbering consistent across ProAudio models.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the matrix.

init.title: Input names
init.description: Assign a friendly name to each input, and use the "Show …" toggle beneath it to hide inputs you don't use from every zone's source list. Leave a name at its default to keep the generic label.
